spec_match.rationale: Accurately tests the three direct effects of removing [LegacyNoInterfaceObject] from FontFaceSet.

interactive.rationale: Real live readout of browser's FontFaceSet prototype shape on load.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the spec framing of why the feature exists (restoring FontFaceSet global identity).

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles browsers where FontFaceSet is undefined without throwing unhandled runtime errors.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to design system styling, though the generic live-probe panel is redundant.

openQuestions.title: Re-review after generic probe removal
openQuestions.detail: The unrelated generated live-probe controls were removed on 2026-06-04. Use chrome-devtools-mcp to re-test the remaining concept UI; if the page is now static or lacks a feature-specific observable behavior, add a real control, readout, server-backed route, or exact feature probe rather than restoring the generic panel.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance removed the unrelated generic live-probe panel; this critique needs chrome-devtools-mcp re-review before treating the interactivity score as current.
